docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SHULBE, JOHNNY-SANTE AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-12-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-15-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-18-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (MAILED TO: CATHERINE WALSHE - STAFF COUNCIL FOR GEICO) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHULBE, JOHNNY-SANTE AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-18-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOHNNY-SANTE SHULBE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GEICO IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE, RETURNED CERTIFIED CARD FILED ON JUL-18-2022 IS INVALID. AGENT FOR SERVICE LISTED ON THE SECRETARY OF STATE WEBSITE NEEDS TO BE PROPER SERVED. CONTINUED DATE NOV-18-2022 REQUESTED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
